variant_specs.name: context_shots
variant_specs.description: Context columns added to shots-against model only; save-rate model matches control.

variant_specs.name: context_both
variant_specs.description: Context columns added to shots-against and save-rate models; secondary diagnostic.

context_shots.description: Context columns added to shots-against model only; save-rate model matches control.

context_both.description: Context columns added to shots-against and save-rate models; secondary diagnostic.

protocol_notes: Feature variants are pre-registered in script code.
EV threshold selection used validation only.
Each variant has exactly one test-fold betting evaluation after validation selection.
context_both is secondary and should not override the primary control vs context_shots comparison.
